title: dracocephalum heterophyllum subsp. heterophyllum
intro: Dracocephalum heterophyllum subsp. heterophyllum, also known as the variable dragonhead or variable dragon, is a plant species in the mint family that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Dracocephalum heterophyllum subsp. heterophyllum include its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and relieve congestion. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
